forecast.name: Today
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 53. Southwest wind 3 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind 7 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the sun rises over Boston, a gentle clarity blankets the city, offering a delightful respite from the weight of winter. Today brings mostly sunny conditions and a crisp high of around 53 degrees, with a modest southwest breeze ruffling the air. As the day progresses, the charm of this gorgeous morning may be fleeting. By mid-afternoon, clouds will gather, hinting at the rain showers expected to emerge later in the day. This transformation invites a tapestry of moods, shifting from the brightness of daylight to a more contemplative, overcast sky as evening approaches.

For those stepping out into the elements today, layering is key; perhaps a light jacket and comfortable, breathable attire will serve well, with a scarf at the ready for the brisk wind. As twilight descends, the atmosphere will thicken with the promise of rain and a low reminiscent of damp, fresh earth. While the impending showers may curtail outdoor adventuring, the beauty lies in embracing the cozy allure of the indoors. An afternoon spent in a quiet café with a warm drink or welcoming friends for a simple gathering could blossom into a delightful way to savor the transition of seasons.
